ddls:
CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "poster_link" TEXT /* Link to the poster image */,
  "series_title" TEXT /* Title of the series or movie */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the series or movie */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* Certificate rating (e.g., A, 18+) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the title */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the title */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the title */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for TV series */,
  "seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons for TV series */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes for TV series */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the title */,
  "trailer_link" TEXT /* Link to the trailer */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the title */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the title */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status (e.g., in production, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, Comedy) */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "actor_birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the actor */,
  "actor_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the crew member is associated with */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., Director, Producer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the industry */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the production company is associated with */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., production, distribution) */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote" INTEGER /* Vote cast by the user (e.g., upvote or downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, moderator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title with the type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of title (e.g., TV series, movie) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the title type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_types_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_title" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title with the genre */,
  "primary_genre_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the genre is primary for the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id", "title_id")
)
